languages.text: "Святой Трон! Прости и спаси нас... Бог-Император!" {n}Сестра Арджента замирает в молитве, сложив руки в аквилу.{/n}
"Holy Throne! Forgive and save us... God-Emperor!" {n}Sister Argenta stands frozen in prayer, her hands forming the sign of the Aquila.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Святой Трон! Прости и спаси нас... Бог-Император!" {n}Сестра Арджента замирает в молитве, сложив руки в аквилу.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Holy Throne! Forgive and save us... God-Emperor!" {n}Sister Argenta stands frozen in prayer, her hands forming the sign of the Aquila.{/n}

"Holy Throne! Forgive and save us... God-Emperor!" {n}Sister Argenta stands frozen in prayer, her hands forming the sign of the Aquila.{/n}

languages.text: 「聖なる御座！赦し、救いを与えてください…神皇帝！」{n}アルゲンタは祈りを捧げ、手を鷲の印で結ぶ。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Holy Throne! Forgive and save us... God-Emperor!" {n}Sister Argenta stands frozen in prayer, her hands forming the sign of the Aquila.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「聖なる御座！赦し、救いを与えてください…神皇帝！」{n}アルゲンタは祈りを捧げ、手を鷲の印で結ぶ。{/n}

languages.text: «¡Por el sagrado Trono! Perdónanos y sálvanos, oh, Dios Emperador!». {n}La hermana Argenta permanece inmóvil, rezando y trazando el signo del Aquila con las manos.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Holy Throne! Forgive and save us... God-Emperor!" {n}Sister Argenta stands frozen in prayer, her hands forming the sign of the Aquila.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «¡Por el sagrado Trono! Perdónanos y sálvanos, oh, Dios Emperador!». {n}La hermana Argenta permanece inmóvil, rezando y trazando el signo del Aquila con las manos.{/n}

languages.text: "Heiliger Thron! Vergib und rette uns ... Gottimperator!" {n}Schwester Argenta ist in ein Gebet versunken und formt mit ihren Händen das Zeichen des Adlers.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Holy Throne! Forgive and save us... God-Emperor!" {n}Sister Argenta stands frozen in prayer, her hands forming the sign of the Aquila.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Heiliger Thron! Vergib und rette uns ... Gottimperator!" {n}Schwester Argenta ist in ein Gebet versunken und formt mit ihren Händen das Zeichen des Adlers.{/n}

languages.text: « Par le Trône ! Pardonnez-nous... Empereur-Dieu ! » {n}Sœur Argenta se tient parfaitement immobile, les mains formant le signe de l'Aquila.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Holy Throne! Forgive and save us... God-Emperor!" {n}Sister Argenta stands frozen in prayer, her hands forming the sign of the Aquila.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Par le Trône ! Pardonnez-nous... Empereur-Dieu ! {n}Sœur Argenta se tient parfaitement immobile, les mains formant le signe de l'Aquila.{/n}

languages.text: “黄金王座在上！宽恕并拯救我们吧……神皇！”{n}阿洁塔修女僵立原地祈祷，双手结成帝国双头鹰手势。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Holy Throne! Forgive and save us... God-Emperor!" {n}Sister Argenta stands frozen in prayer, her hands forming the sign of the Aquila.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “黄金王座在上！宽恕并拯救我们吧……神皇！”{n}阿洁塔修女僵立原地祈祷，双手结成帝国双头鹰手势。{/n}

languages.text: "Kutsal Taht! Bizi affet ve kurtar... Tanrı İmparator!" {n}Dua ederken donup kalan Rahibe Argenta'nın elleri, Çift Başlı Kartal işaretini oluşturuyor.{/n}
